Professional Summary

Cloud engineer with 8 years of experience designing, building, and operating infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Strong background in Kubernetes, infrastructure as code, and CI/CD pipeline design. Experienced working with cross-functional teams to deliver cloud migrations and platform modernisation programmes for mid-market and enterprise clients. Holds AWS and Azure certifications.

Core Skills

AWS (EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, Lambda, IAM) · Azure (AKS, Azure DevOps, Entra ID, App Service) · Kubernetes · Terraform · Ansible · Docker · CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, Jenkins) · Python · Bash · Linux · Networking · Security (IAM, RBAC, Zero Trust) · Observability (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog)

Employment History

Senior Cloud Engineer
Acme Corp | March 2021 – Present

Led the design and delivery of a Kubernetes-based platform on AWS EKS for a financial services client, serving 40 microservices and supporting 2 million daily active users. Worked with the security team to implement RBAC policies and IAM role segregation aligned with SOC 2 requirements.

- Designed and implemented a multi-account AWS landing zone using Terraform, including VPC design, transit gateway, and centralised logging to S3 and CloudWatch
- Led migration of 15 legacy applications from on-premises to AWS, reducing infrastructure costs by 35%
- Built a GitOps-based deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD, cutting deployment time from 4 hours to 12 minutes
- Implemented Prometheus and Grafana observability stack, reducing mean time to detect incidents from 45 minutes to 8 minutes
- Mentored 3 junior engineers in Terraform and Kubernetes best practices

Cloud Engineer

Worked as part of a 6-person platform team delivering infrastructure and automation services to internal product teams. Primary focus on Azure infrastructure and DevOps tooling.

- Built and maintained Azure Kubernetes Service clusters for 4 product teams, standardising deployment patterns and reducing onboarding time for new services from 2 weeks to 3 days
- Designed Azure DevOps pipelines for automated testing, security scanning, and deployment across 12 microservices
- Implemented Azure Policy and Entra ID (Azure AD) conditional access to enforce security baselines across the organisation
